message:
fix(metrics): store histogram bucket boundaries for correct Prometheus export

The histogram recording function accepted custom bucket boundaries but
didn't store them. This caused exportPrometheusFormat() to always use
LATENCY_BUCKETS for the 'le' labels, which would produce incorrect output
if a histogram was recorded with custom boundaries.

Changes:
- Store bucket boundaries alongside bucket counts in histogram storage
- Use stored boundaries in getHistogram() instead of parameter
- Use stored boundaries in exportPrometheusFormat() export
- Deprecate the bucketBoundaries parameter in getHistogram()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
